name: USCR
description: The United States Crypto Reserve holds and represents the top American-built tokens that meet the highest standards of security, transparency, and innovation. The $USCR memecoin will represent the community of innovators supporting the movement! USCR has peaked at over $240M market cap with nearly 50,000 holders. The USCR holds ~$750,000 in United States based cryptocurrencies on a publicly verifiable wallet.
